title: gossypium frutescens
intro: Gossypium frutescens, also known as the negro cotton or black cotton, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the Malvaceae family, native to tropical Africa and Asia. Traditionally, the leaves and roots of this plant have been used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gossypium frutescens include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Gossypium frutescens are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
